text:
is weak and Neptune aspects is good then one experiences very benefits.
If a Neptune in paribhraman makes bad aspects with a strong planet in the natal chart, then there
may not great adverse results. But if natal Neptune has bad aspects then there would be same
trouble.
If Neptune makes good aspects to natal Sun, then it will give inspiration, natural impulse, liking
& creation for fine arts, religious philosophy etc. In this way one gets honour, excellence and
gains during the period.
If Neptune makes bad aspects to natal sun, then one is unfortunate, cheat, unlawful business with
litigations, affairs with other women, loss of strength, etc.
Moon & Neptune
If Neptune makes good aspect with moon then the power of imagination increases, there is
sympathy and compassion, learning occult science, one becomes idealistic and devoted to
religion. This period carries one on the path of occult learning progressively, becomes
visionaries, sea-voyage, creative imagination, adept in art.
